## Summary

One paragraph describing what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (typo, broken link, incorrect instruction)
- [ ] Documentation improvement (clearer explanation, missing info)
- [ ] New example (skill, subagent, rule, ADR, pattern)
- [ ] Structural change (new folder, moved files, renamed things)
- [ ] Other:

## What changed

- File 1: what was updated
- File 2: what was added
- File 3: what was removed

## Checklist

Follow the checklist from `CONTRIBUTING.md`:

- [ ] All internal links work (relative paths)
- [ ] Directory tree in `README.md` matches actual structure
- [ ] No project-specific stack assumptions (specific frameworks or vendors) leak into core files
- [ ] No em-dashes in copy
- [ ] Decision table in `README.md` includes any new file types
- [ ] `LEARN.md` table of contents matches its sections
- [ ] Shell scripts tested standalone if changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a notable change

## Related issues

Closes #, references #

## Additional notes

Anything else the reviewer should know.
